mapper.update: update batch.workflow_run set run_status = #{runStatus}, current_node_code = #{currentNodeCode}, started_at = coalesce(started_at, #{startedAt}), updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id from batch.workflow_run where run_status in ('SUCCESS','FAILED','TERMINATED') and finished_at is not null and finished_at < #{cutoff} order by id asc limit #{limit}
